_comment: R1b H11-DAMPENING leg fixture (scoring.md §19.5, Dave-locked 2026-07-11). SHARED cohort: identity `user` == circle `user_id`. NEGATIVE/SUPPORTED cohort — internalization negatively predicts parochialism steepness p_i = -beta_i (§16): higher internalization -> flatter circle of concern. Supported iff upper 95% CI of corr(internalization, p) < 0.0 (one-sided). Synthetic ground truth; generated by scratchpad gen_r1b_h11.py (NOT committed). Value-neutral: beta_i is dual-read (Singer<->Williams), both poles unranked.
